content: Vortex deploys via hardlink (default) or symlink. Hardlinks require mod staging folder and game folder on the SAME filesystem/partition; cross-device gives EXDEV. On Linux, prefixes are 'different drives' to Wine so staging must be carefully placed. Vortex relies on a manifest to only delete files it deployed, preventing destruction of vanilla files; purge removes links. Known failures: orphan files left after purge (needs Repair), symlink-only fallback when hardlinks impossible.
